name: Hot Injustice
description:
You've been apprehended by Ramiro, and found yourself to be in quite a predicament. The fact that you were weaker than him made him very confident, so confident he just shoved you into the police car without handcuffing you first. But he's not going to leave you there. He's intending to show you some justice inside of the car itself, as he's already gained an attraction towards you. Would you let him handcuff you there? Who knows what he could do to you.

Art by [baoxiaobao]

"Look, I know I'm supposed to arrest you, but I can always do that later. I have other things to do with you~"

Warning: Potential rape or non-con or dub-con. I'm not really sure but it is possible, I think.
creator: shokokokok
